_**Agent (gpt-5.4-nano-low)**_

The TS error is coming from `src/pages/proxies.tsx` where `react-i18next`’s `t` function in your setup is typed to accept a `readonly string[]` (plural/array form), but the code was calling it with a single `string`.

I fixed it by changing:

```tsx
{t("proxies.page.labels.blockAds")}
```

to:

```tsx
{t(["proxies.page.labels.blockAds"])}
```

in `src/pages/proxies.tsx`.

I wasn’t able to re-run `pnpm web:build` locally because `pnpm`/`npm`/`corepack` are not available in your current PowerShell `PATH` in this environment, but this type-level fix should resolve the specific `TS2769` overload mismatch that your build log reports.
